checklist.title: 🚀 Getting started
checklist.subtitle: Three steps through the core flow. This card hides itself once done.
checklist.s1d: A project is the boundary container for data and permissions — everything starts here.
checklist.s2d: Open a project → Drug Assets, define an asset type and add your first record (e.g. a compound).
checklist.s3d: Click "To dataset" on the Drug Assets page, or create one on the Datasets page — an AI-ready dataset.

welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to Bio-Data OS
welcome.desc: A 30-second tour of the main screen. The left sidebar is your workspace nav — just follow the highlights. Click "?" top-right anytime to replay.

projects.title: ① Projects
projects.desc: Everything starts with a project — the boundary container for data and permissions. Files, drug assets and datasets all live inside projects.

newProject.title: ② New project
newProject.desc: Create your first project here. Leave the org unset and it lands in "My Organization" — zero setup to get going.

orgs.title: ③ Organizations
orgs.desc: Organizations are for grouping and collaboration: invite members, share projects, and maintain org-level shared asset types and data.

audit.title: ④ Audit
audit.desc: Who did what, when, to which item — fully logged with a tamper-evident hash chain. Your tool for compliance and troubleshooting.

end.title: 🎉 You're ready
end.desc: Go create a project. Once inside, you'll get a second short tour of the core workflow. Click "?" top-right to replay anytime.

welcome.title: 📦 Inside a project
welcome.desc: This is your project workbench. Here's the core flow: from entering data to generating an AI-ready dataset.

registry.title: ① Drug Assets
registry.desc: Define asset types (compound, antibody…) and enter records here. Sensitive fields (smiles/sequence) are masked by default and granted on demand.

datasets.title: ② Datasets
datasets.desc: Datasets are the AI-ready output — with tags/author/references, versions and lineage.

convert.title: ③ Data to dataset
convert.desc: On the Drug Assets page, click "To dataset": pick fields and turn asset records into a masked dataset in one click, with lineage recorded. That's the core loop!

welcome.title: 📊 Datasets
welcome.desc: Manage your project datasets here — the AI-ready output. Here's tag filtering and creating one.

tags.title: Tag filter
tags.desc: Datasets can carry tags — filter by tag here. Details also show author and references.

new.title: New dataset
new.desc: Upload a CSV/XLSX to create a dataset, or…

convert.title: Easier: convert from assets
convert.desc: More often you'll go to Drug Assets and click "To dataset" — turning entered records straight into a masked dataset, no manual prep.

welcome.title: 🏢 Organization
welcome.desc: Organizations are for grouping and collaboration: members, teams, org-level shared assets, and scoped role grants.

assets.title: Org assets / data
assets.desc: Org-level shared drug assets and data (e.g. an internal compound library) reusable across its projects. Visible to members only.

grants.title: Role grants
grants.desc: Grant scoped roles (including Auditor) to members. Available to org admins.

end.title: Start collaborating
end.desc: Invite members, then share projects or maintain org-level assets. Click "?" top-right to replay.
